Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Longhook]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 9''' — Longhook is a Redmoon Hall emissary.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 9''' — Longhook has a cut along the side of his neck.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — Longhook was an Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — Longhook is a gentleman from Redmoon Hall.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — Longhook's weapon is a Blood Shadow wrapped around a sacred weapon consisting of a long, heavy chain with a thick meat hook at the end.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Longhook is an Underlord who possesses a Blood Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Longhook's right eye is nearly blinded.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Longhook's body was reborn in soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Longhook uses the Path of Rolling Earth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Longhook uses the Mountain's Fist Enforcer technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Longhook is a pure madra Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Longhook's weapon is a hook-and-chain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Longhook's fate does not end with his current situation.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Longhook is the Redmoon Underlord.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Longhook is a deceased individual.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
